idea.title: Late Invoice Follow-Up Sequence for Freelancers
idea.description: Freelancers chasing unpaid invoices get 6 escalating, professionally worded follow-up message templates that recover payment without burning the client relationship.
idea.rationale: Unpaid invoices are a near-universal freelancer pain point with high urgency, the escalating sequence format is highly specific and underserved, and AI excels at generating professionally calibrated email copy with consistent tone progression.
